'use strict'; /*eslint no-console:0*/ /** * Supply a warning to the developer that a method they are using * has been deprecated. * * @param {string} method The name of the deprecated method * @param {string} [instead] The alternate method to use if applicable * @param {string} [docs] The documentation URL to get further details * * @returns {void} */ export default function deprecatedMethod(method, instead, docs) { try { console.warn( 'DEPRECATED method `' + method + '`.' + (instead ? ' Use `' + instead + '` instead.' : '') + ' This method will be removed in a future release.' ); if (docs) { console.warn('For more information about usage see ' + docs); } } catch (e) { /* Ignore */ } }
